titleStmt.title: SII 27.319: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 319. (A.R. No. 72 of 1941-42.) RĀCHĀNAPALLE, ANANTAPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Hero-stone set up by the road-side near the village.

This register an agreement (manevārtte) regarding rents etc., between mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chandarasa and Nāgaya-gavuṇḍa described as his pādamūli. It refers to Koḍiyame-40 division and mentions mahāpradhāna, mane-verggaḍe, kari-tureya-paṭṭasāhaṇi Āneya Kēsimayya. It also refers to an attack made on the village.
It is dated the 17th year Rudhirōdgāri, Vaiśākha ba. 5, Thursday. On palaeographical grounds the record may be assigned to the 12th-13th century.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: svasti samasta prasasti sahitaṁ śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara caṁdarasaru tanna pādamūla

parigrahavāgi koḍiyalu nāgaya gauvuṁḍaṁge koṭṭa
koḍiyame 40 ttaṟiṁ baḷiya beleṟaThis line

mānavārtte Enteṁdoḍe māḍida keyoḷage phaḷepōga salladāntaṁ jīvadhana māṟidoḍe suṁkamā
nya harikāya koḷagadāya Aḍapakavaḷige Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmya holevāda yoḷagāgi tanna

makkaḷu makkaḷu taradalu keṭṭamānavārtte 17
ḷaneya rudhirodgāri saṁvatsarada vaisākha bahuḷa

5 brihaspati śrīvāradaṁdu śrī manmahā pradhānaṁ maneverggaḍe karituriya paṭṭasāhiṇi sēnādhi
pati mahāpracaṁḍa daṁḍanāyaka Āneya kēsimayyaṁgaḷu haṁbuḷigeyalu bida Line 4-5 and 8-9 on the right and left the top to bottom.

biṭṭudaṁ caṁdarasaru kaṟināgeyargge māḍidabaḷiya naṭṭirdda doredoṟpa taṁ mana
goṁḍaneṁdu Aṭṭida baḷige mēgaḍe kudureya ḷi koṭiya niṟidu ḍeya
Ūraḷiveḍeyoḷu guṁjekeya neṟu paḍivaṁ gaṁḍanalleṁdu
mēlāḷu niṟidu jaya jaya jaya namastē namaḥOn the another pannel (not connected with the above).
Immaḍi bhīma tambula
pūrvvada ḷada manavārtthe vimmadu
Digital edition of SII 27.319 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
